name: AMERICAN REALTY INVESTORS INC
summary: American Realty Investors Inc (ARL) is a real estate investment company. Based on the 10-K filing structure, the company is engaged in real estate investment and management activities, including ownership and operation of real estate properties. The filing references properties, market risk disclosures, and financial statements consistent with a real estate investment trust or real estate holding company structure.

products.name: Real Estate Properties
products.description: Ownership and operation of real estate assets as described in the Properties section of the filing.
